output_preview: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant because same-tenant duplicate refreshes should coalesce, but refreshes for different tenants must continue in parallel.","evidence":{"session_id":"auth_refresh_session","blob_id":"","message_id":"auth_fact_3"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A single global mutex was rejected because auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel showed unrelated tenants must not block each other.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["billing_retry_session: billing uses a global mutex because its provider serializes all tenants, which does not apply to auth refresh.","markdown_parser_session: onboarding docs/cache cleanup is unrelated to auth refresh queue behavior."]}
